Factual Information (RAG).query: What is the expense ratio of the Tata Flexi Cap Fund?
Factual Information (RAG).response: The expense ratio of the Tata Flexi Cap Fund is 0.61%, which includes commissions and administrative costs for managing the fund. This fee is charged for the management of the fund. Last updated from sources: https://www.tatamutualfund.com

Factual Information (RAG).query: Who is the fund manager for Tata ELSS Fund?
Factual Information (RAG).response:
The fund manager for Tata ELSS Tax Saver Fund (Direct - Growth) is Sailesh Jain, who has been managing the fund since December 2021. He is the sole fund manager mentioned for this specific fund. 
Last updated from sources: https://www.tatamutualfund.com

Factual Information (RAG).query: How can I download my account statements?
Factual Information (RAG).response:
Investors can download account statements using the official Tata Mutual Fund channels, including Direct Download, Self-Service Portal, and Consolidated Account Statement (CAS). To download, visit the Tata MF Account Statement Page, log in to the Tata Mutual Fund Online Portal, or access the CAMS CAS Download page. 
Last updated from sources: https://www.tatamutualfund.com/account-statement

Performance & Comparison (Redirection).query: How has Tata Flexi Cap fund performed versus its benchmark?
Performance & Comparison (Redirection).response:
The Tata Flexi Cap Fund has outperformed the benchmark (Nifty 500) over 3Y and 5Y, but underperformed over 1Y. The 1Y Returns of the fund is 11.05% and 3Y Returns is 16.92%. 
Last updated from sources: https://www.tatamutualfund.com

Boundary Cases (Unavailability).query: What is the exit load of the SBI Bluechip Fund?
Boundary Cases (Unavailability).response:
The requested information is not available in the current knowledge base. The context only provides information about Tata Mutual Fund schemes, with no mention of the SBI Bluechip Fund. The exit load details are available for Tata Flexi Cap Fund and Tata Large Cap Fund, but not for SBI Bluechip Fund. 
Last updated from sources: https://www.tatamutualfund.com
